seoTitle: How to Edit Vendor Details in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Learn how to edit vendor details in QuickBooks Online, from contact information to payment settings, so your vendor records stay current.
intro: Vendor information changes over time, whether it's a new address, updated contact, or different payment terms. This guide covers how to locate and edit vendor details in QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Open the vendor list
steps.body: Go to your list of vendors and find the specific vendor whose details need updating.

steps.heading: Open the vendor's profile
steps.body: Click into the vendor to view their current contact and payment information.

steps.heading: Edit the necessary fields
steps.body: Update the contact details, address, or payment settings that have changed.

steps.heading: Save the changes
steps.body: Save the updated vendor profile and confirm the new details are reflected correctly.

faq.question: Will editing vendor details change past transactions?
faq.answer: No, updating vendor details going forward doesn't alter historical transactions already recorded.

faq.question: Can I update a vendor's payment terms?
faq.answer: Yes, payment terms are typically editable within the vendor's profile settings.

faq.question: What if I need to merge two vendor records?
faq.answer: Similar to merging accounts, you can rename one vendor to match another to trigger a merge, though this is a separate process from basic editing.

faq.question: Can I make a vendor inactive instead of deleting them?
faq.answer: Yes, marking a vendor as inactive removes them from active lists while preserving their transaction history.
